query:
SELECT 'tents' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM tents
UNION ALL
SELECT 'plants', COUNT(*) FROM plants
UNION ALL
SELECT 'task_templates', COUNT(*) FROM task_templates
UNION ALL
SELECT 'cycles', COUNT(*) FROM cycles
UNION ALL
SELECT 'tent_logs', COUNT(*) FROM tent_logs;
